# Zyrakon Technologies
> The Foundation of Intelligent Technology. Building enterprise platforms for digital signatures, banking, airport operations, and AI-powered intelligence.

## Company
- About Zyrakon: https://zyrakon.com/pages/about/
- Our Story: https://zyrakon.com/pages/our-story/
- Trust Center: https://zyrakon.com/pages/trust-center/
- Research & Innovation: https://zyrakon.com/pages/research/
- Technology: https://zyrakon.com/pages/technology/

## Products
- SecureDoc (Digital Signatures): https://zyrakon.com/pages/products/securedoc/
- NUBRA (Banking Platform): https://zyrakon.com/pages/products/nubra/
- TALON (Airport Operations): https://zyrakon.com/pages/products/talon/
- Stock Market Analytics: https://zyrakon.com/pages/products/stock-analytics/
- Mailbox IQ (Email Intelligence): https://zyrakon.com/pages/products/mailbox-iq/

## Company Info
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Singapore
- Legal Name: Zyrakon Technologies Private Limited
- Tagline: The Foundation of Intelligent Technology
- Mission: To research, design, build and deliver world-class technologies that solve meaningful problems.
- Values: Trust First, Innovation with Purpose, Engineering Excellence, Integrity Always, Long-Term Thinking, Customer Success
- Contact: https://zyrakon.com/pages/contact/
- Careers: https://zyrakon.com/pages/careers/
- Developers: https://zyrakon.com/pages/developers/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Zyrakon
